历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum ranking was approximately 4091, which significantly shifted backward to 17125 in 2024 (affected by...), and rebounded to 6065 in 2025; the rankings have fluctuated sharply over the past three years, with a baseline ranking of about 6065 in 2025; the provincial science enrollment plan was 29 in 2023, 31 in 2024, and 36 in 2025, showing a year-on-year expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 41, an increase of 5 from 2025 (an expansion of about 13.9%), which is a relatively large expansion and has a certain mitigating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 59th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable position in the 50-60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving management measures such as dormitory security checks, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 41st overall), short video exposure is moderately high, and application attention is acceptable; no history of admission cut-off gaps; Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, with strong strengths in economics, management, and humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, which highly aligns with the university's science enrollment majors (Artificial Intelligence, Optoelectronic Information, Economic Statistics, etc.); in 2025, the number of science examinees in the province was about 52,538, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is about 238,000 (including arts and sciences), with an estimated 163,000 science examinees based on historical proportions, indicating a significant increase in the number of examinees and intensified competition. Compared to the 2024 score of 390, the ranking fluctuations are mainly affected by the number of examinees; Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, in the South China region, which is a long-distance cross-province application for Xinjiang examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is very small (about 1%-2%), so regional preference has a limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 6065, the 2026 expansion of about 13.9% (mitigating competition), and the significant increase in the number of examinees in the province (intensifying competition), the expansion effect is partially offset by the increase in examinees, resulting in a net effect of slightly intensified competition; combined with factors such as persistently high major popularity and stable school reputation, the predicted minimum ranking is about 6600, with a range of 6100-7100.
